title: Establish CI, benchmark baselines and long-run diagnostics
summary: Create CI jobs for static checks, unit/integration/E2E tests, deterministic scenarios, benchmark artifact publication and dependency/security checks.
acceptance: CI runs on pull requests and records exact environment/tool versions
Determinism and long-run failures emit seed, first divergent tick and artifact paths
Benchmark changes are compared to an explicit baseline
No test silently retries nondeterministic product behavior

history.details: Added PR CI parity jobs, benchmark baseline comparison, deterministic long-run diagnostics, and no-retry guards; pnpm ci:local, pnpm bench, and pnpm audit:deps pass
